name: phase08_review2
outcome_goal: Review phases 5-7: verify drag-and-drop, layout persistence, manifest editor, TypeScript compilation

jobs.label: review2_verify
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis. Postgres at postgresql://nate@127.0.0.1:5432/dag_workflow. PATH includes /opt/homebrew/bin and /opt/homebrew/Cellar/node/25.6.1/bin.

Run review of phases 5-7:

1. TypeScript compilation:
   cd Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -30

2. Verify new files exist:
   - src/grid/ModulePalette.tsx
   - src/grid/ModulePalette.css
   - src/grid/SaveLayoutBar.tsx
   - src/grid/ManifestEditor.tsx
   - src/grid/ManifestEditor.css
   - src/primitives/Toast.tsx

3. Verify drag-and-drop in QuadrantGrid:
   grep -n 'draggable\|onDragStart\|onDrop\|handleDrop' src/grid/QuadrantGrid.tsx | head -10

4. Verify save API endpoints:
   curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8421/api/manifests/save -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"id":"test-save","name":"Test Save","manifest":{"version":2,"grid":"4x4","quadrants":{}}}' 2>/dev/null | head -1

5. Verify ManifestEditor loads:
   grep -n 'ManifestEditor' src/App.tsx

6. Fix any TypeScript errors found.

Report PASS/FAIL for each check.
